sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) [const. הֲדַר, with suff. הֲדָרִי, pl. const. הַדְרֵי], ornament, adorning, decoration, Psa 45:4 96:6 . Eze 16:14. הַדְרֵי קֹדֶשׁ “holy ornaments,” Psa 110:3. Pro 20:29, הֲדַר זְקֵנִים שֵׂיבָה “the adorning of old men is hoariness.” Levit. 23:40 , עֵץ הָדָר “ornamental trees.” Specially used of the majesty of God. Psa 104:1, הֹוד וְהָדָר לָבַשְׁתָּ “thou art clothed with honour and majesty.” Job 40:10. Psa 29:4, קֹול יְהֹוָה בֶּהָדָר “the voice of Jehovah is in majesty.”

(2) honour, Psa 149:9.
